hero.description: Horizon Tech d.o.o. ni isosiyete y'ikoranabuhanga ku isi ifite icyicaro i Sarajevo, itanga ibisubizo bya software bigezweho ku bigo byo ku migabane itatu.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: We help organizations turn ambitious ideas into reliable digital products that create measurable business value.
points: Guhuza itangwa ry'ikoranabuhanga n'ibisubizo by'ubucuruzi bisobanutse.
Kubaka sisitemu y'igihe kirekire ikomeza kubungabunga uko amatsinda ayongera.
Gukorana bya hafi n'abafatanyabikorwa kuva ku ngamba kugeza mu ishyirwa mu bikorwa.

expertise.title: Ubuhanga
expertise.description: Amatsinda yacu y'ubuhanga butandukanye ahuza ubuhanga n'ibitekerezo by'ibicuruzwa mu mifuka y'ikoranabuhanga rigezweho.
points: Cloud architecture, DevOps automation, and resilient infrastructure.
Applied AI / ML, data workflows, and IoT-enabled products.

approach.title: Uburyo
approach.description: We execute with a transparent, iterative model that keeps delivery predictable while reducing product risk.
points: Discover: define scope, priorities, and success metrics early.
Build: ship in focused increments with continuous feedback loops.
Optimize: Monitor results and improve performance over time.

cta.title: Waba witeguye guhindura ubucuruzi bwawe?
cta.description: Kwinjira ku rutonde rugenda rukura rw'ibigo byizera Horizon Tech mu gutanga ibisubizo bishya n'ibisubizo bidasanzwe.

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.description: Waba ufite umushinga mu bitekerezo? Twifuza kumva ibyawe. Kanda hano urebe uko twagufasha kugera ku ntego zawe mu buzima bwawe.

booking.title: Book a Meeting
booking.description: Teganya guhamagara ku buntu mu gihe cy'iminota 30

email.title: Email
email.description: Nyoherereza ubutumwa bugufi kuri email igihe icyo ari cyo cyose

form.title: Send Us a Message
form.success: Murakoze cyane kubw'ubutumwa bwanyu. Turindikira ubutumwa bwawe mumasaha 24-48.
form.error: Hari ikintu kitagenda neza. Please try again or email us directly.
form.subject: Ingingo *

placeholders.name: Izina ryawe
placeholders.subject: Ni iki twafasha?
placeholders.message: Tubwire igitekerezo cyawe cyangwa igitekerezo cyawe...

validation.email: Nyamuneka shyiramo aderesi ya email yemewe.
validation.messageMinLength: Ubutumwa bugomba kuba bufite nibura inyuguti {{count}} ndebure.

reasons: Gushyigikira no kubungabunga ibidukikije mu buryo burambye

custom.title: Ibisubizo byihariye
custom.description: Gushaka igisubizo cyiza? Dukorana bya hafi n'abakiriya kugira ngo dusobanukirwe ibyifuzo byihariye no gutanga software yihariye itanga ibisubizo bipimwa.

faq.title: Waba ufite ibindi bibazo?
faq.description: Reba igice cyacu cya FAQ kugirango ubone ibisubizo byihuse

hero.description: Itsinda ritandukanye ry'abahanga mu ikoranabuhanga, abashushanya, n'abahanga mu by'imitekerereze bubaka ibicuruzwa bya digitale bigezweho hamwe.

section.title: Itsinda ry'ubuyobozi
section.description: Abayobozi b'ibigo by'imari iciriritse bayoboye icyerekezo n'iterambere ry'Ikigo cy'Igihugu cy'Imisoro n'Amahoro

hamza.bio: Umuyobozi w'icyerekezo n'umwubatsi wa tekiniki ufite imyaka 10+ muri software y'ubucuruzi, umwihariko muri AI / ML, imbuga z'ibicu, n'ubwubatsi bw'ibicuruzwa bigezweho.

ahmet.bio: Cybersecurity specialist focused on enterprise security architecture, secure on-prem infrastructure, and compliance-first delivery for regulated environment.

culture.title: Ubuzima muri Horizon Tech
culture.description: Duteza imbere umuco wo guhanga udushya, ubufatanye no kwiga mu buryo buhoraho

remoteFirst.title: Kure-First Culture
remoteFirst.description: Gukora ahantu hose ukoresheje amasaha y'akazi kandi wibanda ku byavuye mu matora, aho kwibanda ku bintu.

collaborative.title: Ibidukikije by'ubufatanye
collaborative.description: Regular team events, knowledge sharing sessions, and cross-functional collaboration.

workLife.title: Uburinganire hagati y'akazi n'ubuzima
workLife.description: Politiki y'ikiruhuko, ubufasha bw'ubuzima bwo mu mutwe, no kubaha igihe cy'umuntu ku giti cye.

innovation.title: Igihe cyo guhanga udushya
innovation.description: 20% by'igihe cyo gukora imishinga y'umuntu ku giti cye, hackathons, no gushakisha ikoranabuhanga rishya.

cta.title: Urashaka kwinjira mu itsinda ryacu?
cta.description: Buri gihe dushakisha abantu bafite impano bita ku bukorikori, ubutunzi no guhanga udushya.

hero.description: Join a team of engineers building cutting-edge software for global clients. Kora kure, gukura buri gihe, kandi ugire ingaruka nyazo.

process.title: Our Hiring Process
process.description: Shyira mu gaciro, ushyira mu gaciro, kandi wubaha igihe cyawe

steps.title: Apply
steps.description: Tanga ubusabe bwawe kandi tuzabisuzuma mu minsi 3 y'akazi.

steps.title: Ikiganiro cya mbere
steps.description: Guhamagara kuri videwo mu gihe cy'iminota 30 kugira ngo uganire ku bunararibonye bwawe n'ibyo wifuza.

steps.title: Tekiniki
steps.description: Technical interview or practical exercise to showcase your skills.

steps.title: Gutanga
steps.description: Meet the team and receive your offer to join Horizon Tech.

jobs.title: Imyanya ifunguye
jobs.description: Find your next opportunity and join our growing team
jobs.unavailable: Mu gihe cy'ubugimbi n'ubwangavu, ntibyemewe n'amategeko

listings.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
listings.description: Kubaka porogaramu z'ubucuruzi zigezweho ukoresheje ikoranabuhanga rya React, Node.js, na Cloud.

listings.title: DevOps Engineer
listings.description: Gushushanya no kubungabunga imiyoboro ya CI / CD, ibikorwa remezo nka code, na sisitemu yo kugenzura.

listings.title: AI/ML Engineer
listings.description: Develop machine learning models and AI solutions for enterprise clients.

listings.title: Product Designer
listings.description: Create beautiful, intuitive user experiences for complex enterprise applications.

listings.title: Solutions Architect
listings.description: Gutegura ibisubizo bya tekiniki no kuyobora abakiriya binyuze mu mpinduka za digitale.

listings.title: Umwanditsi wa tekiniki
listings.description: Create comprehensive documentation, tutorials, and technical content.

cta.title: Ibibazo bijyanye no gukora hano?
cta.description: Twifuza kumva ibyawe. Tuzakomeza kubagezaho ibisubizo by'ibibazo byose bijyanye n'ubuzima bw'imyororokere.

hero.description: Explore how we've helped companies across industries transform operations through practical, high-impact technology.

items.title: Cloud Migration & Modernization
items.description: Migrated legacy banking systems to AWS cloud infrastructure with zero downtime.
items.challenge: Legacy monolithic architecture causing scalability issues
items.result: Rayon Sports yatsinze Rayon Sports mu mukino wa gicuti

items.title: AI-Powered Diagnostic Platform
items.description: Built ML models for medical image analysis with 95%+ accuracy.
items.challenge: Manual diagnostic processes taking too long
items.result: Ibipimo by'ubuziranenge bw'ibinyabiziga bifashishije AI / ML

items.title: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard
items.description: Developed BI platform processing 10M+ events daily.
items.challenge: No real time visibility into key business metrics

cta.title: Waba witeguye kwandika inkuru y'intsinzi yawe?
cta.description: Reka turebere hamwe uko twagufasha kugera ku ntego nk'izo kandi ukagira icyizere cyinshi.

hero.description: Technical tutorials, industry insights, and practical lessons from real delivery work.

posts.excerpt: Ubuyobozi bw'Akarere ka Gicumbi buvuga ko bugiye gukurikirana no gukurikirana ishyirwa mu bikorwa ry'imyanzuro y'Inama y'Abaminisitiri.

posts.title: Machine Learning in Production: Lessons Learned
posts.excerpt: Field-tested lessons from deploying ML models at scale.

posts.excerpt: 19 Sobanukirwa n'imiterere y'umubiri w'umuntu n'ingaruka zabyo.

newsletter.description: Menya ibitabo bishya, ibitabo n'ibitekerezo byatanzwe buri cyumweru.
newsletter.note: Nta spam. Kwiyandikisha igihe icyo ari cyo cyose.

support.faqDescription: Ibisubizo byihuse by'ibibazo abantu bakunze kwibaza

faqs.question: Ni izihe serivisi Horizon Tech itanga?
faqs.answer: Dutanga iterambere rya software yihariye, ibisubizo bya AI / ML, ubwubatsi bw'igicu, DevOps, ubwenge bw'ubucuruzi, na serivisi za IoT.

faqs.question: Ni gute natangira umushinga hamwe na Horizon Tech?
faqs.answer: Watwandikira ukoresheje fomu cyangwa imeyili ukoresheje ibyo ukeneye. Tuzakora igenzura ryimbitse kandi dusangire ibitekerezo.

faqs.question: Waba utanga ubufasha n'ubufasha mu buryo buhoraho?
faqs.answer: Yego. Dutanga ubufasha no kubungabunga ibicuruzwa birimo gukosora amakosa, kuvugurura umutekano, no kunoza ibintu.
